title: Intraverbal 14-M
description: Describes different events, videos, stories, etc. with at least 8 words.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child a score of 1 if he describes 25 different events, videos, stories, etc. with at least 8 words. The responses should only be scored as correct if they occur without echoic prompts. Also, the verbal descriptions should be evoked by other words, not the visual events themselves. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he describes at least 12 different events, videos, stories, etc., with at least 5 words.

title: Intraverbal 15-M
description: Answers 4 different rotating WH questions about a single topic for 10 topics (e.g., Who takes you to school? Where do you go to school? What do you take to school?). (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he answers 4 different WH questions about a single topic for 10 topics. The questions should be asked one right after another. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he answers 3 different WH questions about a single topic for 5 topics.

title: Classroom Routines and Group Skills
description: Classroom Routines and Group Skills for Level 3.

title: Classroom Routines 11-M
description: Uses the toilet and washes hands with only verbal prompts.(O)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he uses the toilet and washes his hands with verbal prompts. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he uses the toilet and washes his hands, but requires physical assistance.

title: Classroom Routines 12-M
description: Responds to 5 different group instructions or questions without direct prompts in a group of 3 or more children (e.g., Everybody stand up. Does anyone have a red shirt on?).(O)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he responds to 5 different group instructions or questions without prompts in a group of 3 or more children. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he responds to 2 different group instructions or questions without prompts in a group of 3 or more children.

title: Classroom Routines 13-M
description: Works independently for 5 minutes in a group, and stays on task for 50% of the period.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he works independently for 5 minutes in a group activity/session involving 3 or more children, and stays on task for 50% of the period. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he works independently for 2 minutes in a group activity/session involving 3 or more children, and stays on task for 50% of the period.

title: Classroom Routines 14-M
description: Acquires 2 new behaviors during a 15-minute group-teaching format involving 5 or more children. (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he acquires 2 new behaviors in a 15-minute group-teaching format involving 5 or more children as measured by an individual post-test. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he acquires 1 new behavior in a 15-minute group-teaching format involving 5 or more children as measured by an individual post-test.

title: Classroom Routines 15-M
description: Sits in a 20-minute group session involving 5 children without problem behaviors, and answers 5 intraverbal questions. (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he sits appropriately, and answers 5 intraverbal questions presented in a 20-minute group-teaching format involving 5 or more children. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he sits appropriately, and answers 2 intraverbal questions presented in a 20-minute group-teaching format involving 5 or more children.
